note: First chaos baseline evidence document. The .github/workflows/chaos-testing.yml workflow is scheduled weekly (Wednesdays 01:00 UTC). First live run will execute on 2026-04-08 or next scheduled date. This document records the chaos probe methodology and expected outcomes.

probes_defined.name: Health endpoint availability
probes_defined.description: Verifies the primary health endpoint is reachable and responds within SLO

probes_defined.name: Readiness check with dependency verification
probes_defined.description: Verifies DB and Redis connectivity via the readiness probe

probes_defined.name: Version/provenance endpoint
probes_defined.description: Confirms build_sha is present and non-empty

probes_defined.name: Unauthenticated boundary enforcement
probes_defined.description: Confirms that protected routes reject unauthenticated requests

probes_defined.name: Invalid input rejection
probes_defined.description: Confirms that invalid input returns a 4xx client error, not 500
